zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Basset於1130年出生在英國奧可福爾比斯特時，他的父親Gilbert Bassett40歲，母親Edith D'Oyly33歲。他於1149年與Adeliza Dunstanville在英國英格蘭奧可福爾比斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1167年在英國艾可被列為judge (itinerant justice)。他去世於大約1182年在英國奧可福爾希阿丁頓享年53歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Basset于1130年出生在英国奧可福爾比斯特时，他的父亲Gilbert Bassett40岁，母亲Edith D'Oyly33岁。他于1149年与Adeliza Dunstanville在英国英格兰奧可福爾比斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1167年在英国艾可被列为judge (itinerant justice)。他去世于大约1182年在英国奧可福爾希阿丁頓享年53岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Basset was born in 1130, in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Gilbert Bassett, was 40 and his mother, Edith D'Oyly, was 33. He married Adeliza Dunstanville in 1149, in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. In 1167, his occupation is listed as judge (itinerant justice) in Essex, England. He died about 1182, in Headington, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Basset est né en 1130, à Bicester, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert Bassett, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Edith D'Oyly, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Adeliza Dunstanville en 1149, à Bicester, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. En 1167, sa profession de son indiquée est judge (itinerant justice) à Essex, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1182, à Headington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Basset 1130 in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Bassett 40 und seine Mutter Edith D'Oyly 33. Er hat 1149 in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Adeliza Dunstanville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1167 ist sein Beruf als judge (itinerant justice) in Essex, England aufgeführt. Er starb um 1182 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Headington, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Basset è nato il nel 1130 nel Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Gilbert Bassett, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Edith D'Oyly, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Adeliza Dunstanville nel 1149, nel Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1167, la sua occupazione è indicata come judge (itinerant justice) nel Essex, England. Morì circa 1182, nel Headington, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bassetが1130年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアビセスターで生まれた時，父Gilbert Bassettは40歳，母Edith D'Oylyは33歳であった。1149年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアビセスターでAdeliza Dunstanvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1167年，イギリスエセックスでの職業はjudge (itinerant justice)と記録されている。彼は約1182年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアヘディントンで53歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Basset(이)가 1130년 영국 스퍼드실르 바이스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Bassett(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Edith D'Oyly(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1149년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 바이스스터에서 Adeliza Dunstanville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1167년, 그의 직업은 영국 에세스에서 judge (itinerant justice)이었다. 그는 대략 1182년 영국 스퍼드실르 헤딩턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Basset nasceu em 1130, em Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert Bassett, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Edith D'Oyly, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Adeliza Dunstanville em 1149, em Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1167, sua profissão aparece como judge (itinerant justice) em Essex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1182, em Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Basset родился в 1130 г. в местности баисестир, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Bassett было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Edith D'Oyly, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeliza Dunstanville в 1149 г. в местности баисестир, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1167 году он работал по профессии judge (itinerant justice) в местности эссекс, Англия. Он умер около 1182 г. в местности хидингтон, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Basset nació en 1130, en Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert Bassett, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Edith D'Oyly, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Adeliza Dunstanville en 1149, en Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1167, su ocupación registrada era judge (itinerant justice) en Essex, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1182, en Headington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
